headings.usage: Hero headlines, section titles, card titles. Brings an editorial, trustworthy holistic medicine vibe.

body.usage: Body text, questionnaire labels, buttons, metadata. Clean, geometric but approachable.

scale_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-light

spacing.generous: Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for main sections. Breathe room is essential.
spacing.cards: Minimum p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers.

disclaimer_bar.style: bg-[#FDF1E5] text-[#7A5A3A] py-2 px-4 text-xs text-center font-body border-b border-[#EAE5D9]

hero.style: Asymmetric split layout. Text on left, image on right with organic rounded corners (e.g., rounded-tl-[80px] rounded-br-[80px]).
hero.background: bg-[#FDFBF7] with very subtle noise or grain texture if possible.

protocol_bento.card_style: bg-white border border-[#EAE5D9] rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm
protocol_bento.spans: Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, col-span-6 to create an interesting asymmetric bento grid for the 5 protocols.

questionnaire_wizard.container: Max-w-2xl mx-auto mt-12 bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#EAE5D9]
questionnaire_wizard.progress_bar: h-1 bg-[#F5F2EB] w-full rounded-full overflow-hidden. Inner fill bg-[#2C5E7A] transition-all duration-500
questionnaire_wizard.inputs: Use Shadcn components lightly styled. Generous padding, no harsh black borders. Focus rings should be ring-[#2C5E7A]/20.

prescription_card.container: Max-w-3xl mx-auto bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#D5CEBC] p-8 md:p-10 shadow-lg relative print:shadow-none print:border-none
prescription_card.code_chip_sequence: Flex items-center gap-2 text-sm md:text-base font-mono bg-white p-3 rounded-lg border border-[#EAE5D9]

code_chip_styles.code_number: bg-[#E9F1F5] text-[#2C5E7A] font-bold px-4 py-1 rounded text-lg

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Minimal padding, dense data display. bg-page.
admin_dashboard.table: Shadcn Table, border-[#EAE5D9]. Header text uppercase, tracking-wider.
admin_dashboard.drawer: Shadcn Sheet for plan preview. Slides in from right, bg-white.

imagery.description: Sports/wellness lifestyle image for the main landing page hero.
imagery.usage: Right side of the hero section, overlapping the background slightly.
In the 'How it works' or Prescription card header area to build trust.
Dedicated full-width section explaining the FREEDOM healing method.
Background or accent image for the Detoxification bento card.
Background or accent image for the Repair/Recovery bento card.
Background or accent image for the Health & Wellness card.

libraries: framer-motion (for page transitions, step reveals, and card lifts)
lucide-react (for UI icons: checks, arrows, close buttons)
shadcn/ui (for forms, select, slider, dialog, sheet, table)

shadcn_overrides.card: Remove default borders if used inside bento, apply custom #EAE5D9 borders. Use rounded-2xl or 3xl.
shadcn_overrides.button_primary: bg-[#2C5E7A] text-white hover:bg-[#214A61] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg transition-transform active:scale-95

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: `data-testid='hero-cta-button'`, `data-testid='questionnaire-step-1-submit'`, `data-testid='disclaimer-banner'`, `data-testid='protocol-card-detox'`

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the Google Fonts URL into index.html.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors, fonts (Cormorant Garamond for serif, Manrope for sans), and extend spacing if necessary.
Implement the Disclaimer bar as a fixed/sticky element at the very top of the layout.
Build the Landing Page with the provided imagery, hero split layout, and Bento grid for the 5 protocols.
The Questionnaire MUST be multi-step using state. Collect demographics, goal, symptoms, and autoimmune flag.
If the autoimmune flag is checked, the plan must inform the user to return in 30 days for re-assessment.
Design the 'Prescription Card' with the exact AUTO, Code, RUN visual chips sequence. Add a Print/Download button.
Add a mock email capture step right before revealing the personalized plan.
Use JS/JSX exclusively. Do not use TSX.
